title: pilosella caespitosa subsp. trichoderma
intro: Pilosella caespitosa subsp. trichoderma, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella caespitosa plant, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella caespitosa subsp. trichoderma include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilosella caespitosa subsp. trichoderma include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicinal remedies.
